title: Snowdog - REKT
relevance_summary: Custom liquidity pool with front-running protection leading to price manipulation and rug pull

prevention.rule: Block any tx that creates a custom liquidity pool with front-running protection mechanisms.

red_flags: Unusual price increase shortly after liquidity migration
attacker_addresses: Not explicitly mentioned but likely from FTX
summary: Snowdog used a custom liquidity pool with front-running protection to manipulate the price of SDOG tokens, resulting in a significant loss for most users. A guard could have detected and blocked the creation of such pools.
